CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Continued To Sep-24-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - DEFENDANT 1125 SIR FRANCIS DRAKE BOULEVARD OPERATING COMPANY , LLC, (ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS VIBRA HEALTHCARE, INC.) DBA KENTFIELD HOSPITAL SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendant Vibra Healthcare, Inc.'s Demurrer to Plaintiffs' Complaint is overruled.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - DEFENDANT 1125 SIR FRANCIS DRAKE BOULEVARD OPERATING COMPANY , LLC, (ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS VIBRA HEALTHCARE, INC.) DBA KENTFIELD HOSPITAL SAN FRANCISCO MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Defendant Vibra Healthcare, Inc.'s Motion to Strike is DENIED.

Defendant's motion is focused on striking substantially all or material parts of Plaintiff Staten's third cause of action because the cause of action, Defendant contends, fails to state a cognizable claim. The court has found Plaintiff Staten's third cause of action states a cognizable claim. Further, because Plaintiff Staten's dependent adult abuse claim survives, Defendant's section 425.13 argument against the punitive damages request fails because section 425.13 does not apply to such dependent adult abuse claims. (See Covenant Care, Inc. v. Superior Court (2004) 32 Cal.4th 771, 783.) Thus, Defendant's motion to strike fails.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
